en: But you know kind of I saw you again Today
ko: 이건 끝이 아니야, 다시 널 봤어

en: I had to turn my heart away
Smile like the sun Kisses for everyone
You lied so low in the weeds
ko: 너는 풀 속에 낮게 숨어 있었지

en: I bet you wanna ambush me
You had me down, down, down On my knees
ko: 너는 나를 무릎 꿇게 만들 거야

en: Now wouldn't you buy rock and roll
Back over time We were all crying for free
ko: 과거로 돌아가면, 우리는 모두 울고 있었어

en: You had the voice in me Oh-oh
